final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day Hangzhou itinerary, featuring real Hangzhou map as the background, famous landmarks floating on card paper.

Style/medium: tri-fold brochure, travel guide, map-based infographic
Composition: tri-fold layout with map as background, landmarks floating on card paper
Subject: Hangzhou 4-day travel itinerary (West Lake, Lingyin Temple, Jiuxi, Grand Canal/Xixi Wetland)
Scene/backdrop: real Hangzhou city map as background
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: card paper texture, map paper
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南" "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺" "第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵" "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城" "第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人" "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径" "第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面"
Constraints: must show famous landmarks with distinctive features, landmarks should appear to float on card paper
Avoid:
